# libredash api

Call any generated LibreDash API operation

## Usage

```sh
libredash api
```

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash call`: Call a generated API operation
- `libredash describe`: Describe a generated API operation
- `libredash list`: List generated API operations
